; Ferrari phase 2. Prewarm and clone native stationery, bind its pages, then open it.
; Ferrari Sidebar.qml SHA-256: 5cfd661e6c68c343513d9ca034042ee3f5cdc3ab0df77ea0396838c77135adc0
; Sanitized Sidebar fixture SHA-256: dba999d3dbadf0a2c61506398a11f5ae485d637e15036d9dd508db2021df0fca
; Ferrari CreateNotebook.qml SHA-256: 808163f296c9f272710bd07082b868039b948983c051a28a54bea13380c0316d
VERSION 3.28.0.162
AFFECT [[4911547370760691430]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[14125623155555875541]]#[[15885405667098360701]] > [[5882927607508357618]]#lettersHomeLauncher
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            property string sessionId: ""
            property string documentId: ""
            property string seedDocumentId: ""
            property string seedIncomingPageId: ""
            property string seedReplyPageId: ""
            property bool seedForLaunch: false
            property bool seedRequestInFlight: false
            property bool seedCreating: false

            function currentFolderId() {
                const activeContext = NavigationManager.activeContext;
                return activeContext && activeContext.explorer
                    ? activeContext.explorer.currentFolderId : "";
            }

            function failLaunch(reason) {
                lettersHomeLaunchWatchdog.stop();
                console.warn("[LettersHome] native launch failed", reason);
                lettersHomeLauncher.sessionId = "";
                lettersHomeLauncher.documentId = "";
                lettersHomeLauncher.seedForLaunch = false;
                lettersHomeLauncher.text = "Letters Home";
                lettersHomeLauncher.enabled = true;
            }

            function postBinding(createdId, incomingPageId, replyPageId) {
                if (!incomingPageId || !replyPageId) {
                    failLaunch("native_page_ids_unavailable");
                    return;
                }
                const bindRequest =   new   XMLHttpRequest();
                bindRequest.open("POST", "http://10.11.99.16:8765/v1/sessions/bind");
                bindRequest.setRequestHeader("Content-Type", "application/json");
                bindRequest.onreadystatechange = function() {
                    if (bindRequest.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
                        return;
                    }
                    try {
                        if (bindRequest.status !== 200) {
                            lettersHomeLauncher.failLaunch("native_bind_failed");
                            return;
                        }
                        lettersHomeLaunchWatchdog.stop();
                        lettersHomeLauncher.text = "Letters Home";
                        lettersHomeLauncher.enabled = true;
                        lettersHomeLauncher.seedForLaunch = false;
                        root.toggle();
                        root.windowNavigator.open("legacydevice/window/main", {
                            documentId: lettersHomeLauncher.documentId
                        });
                    } catch (error) {
                        lettersHomeLauncher.failLaunch("native_open_callback_failed");
                    }
                };
                bindRequest.send(JSON.stringify({
                    session_id: lettersHomeLauncher.sessionId,
                    document_id: createdId,
                    incoming_page_id: incomingPageId,
                    reply_page_id: replyPageId
                }));
            }

            function openSeedClone() {
                const folderId = currentFolderId();
                if (!folderId || !seedDocumentId || !sessionId) {
                    failLaunch("native_seed_clone_inputs_missing");
                    return;
                }
                root.windowNavigator.open("library-ui/window/create-notebook", {
                    currentFolderId: folderId,
                    lettersHomeClone: true,
                    lettersHomeSeedDocumentId: seedDocumentId,
                    lettersHomeSeedIncomingPageId: seedIncomingPageId,
                    lettersHomeSeedReplyPageId: seedReplyPageId,
                    lettersHomeDocumentName: "Letters Home " + sessionId,
                    onCreated: function(createdId, incomingPageId, replyPageId) {
                        try {
                            if (!createdId || !incomingPageId || !replyPageId) {
                                lettersHomeLauncher.failLaunch("native_seed_clone_failed");
                                return;
                            }
                            lettersHomeLauncher.documentId = createdId;
                            lettersHomeLauncher.postBinding(
                                createdId,
                                incomingPageId,
                                replyPageId
                            );
                        } catch (error) {
                            lettersHomeLauncher.failLaunch("native_seed_clone_callback_failed");
                        }
                    },
                    onFailed: function(reason) {
                        lettersHomeLauncher.failLaunch(reason || "native_seed_clone_failed");
                        if (reason === "native_seed_invalid") {
                            lettersHomeLauncher.seedDocumentId = "";
                            lettersHomeLauncher.seedIncomingPageId = "";
                            lettersHomeLauncher.seedReplyPageId = "";
                            lettersHomeDeferredSeedTimer.restart();
                        }
                    }
                });
            }

            function bindCreatedSeed(createdId, incomingPageId, replyPageId) {
                if (!incomingPageId || !replyPageId) {
                    if (seedForLaunch) {
                        failLaunch("native_seed_page_ids_unavailable");
                    }
                    return;
                }
                const request =   new   XMLHttpRequest();
                request.open("POST", "http://10.11.99.16:8765/v1/notebook-seed/bind");
                request.setRequestHeader("Content-Type", "application/json");
                request.onreadystatechange = function() {
                    if (request.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
                        return;
                    }
                    try {
                        if (request.status !== 200) {
                            if (lettersHomeLauncher.seedForLaunch) {
                                lettersHomeLauncher.failLaunch("native_seed_bind_failed");
                            }
                            return;
                        }
                        if (lettersHomeLauncher.seedForLaunch) {
                            lettersHomeLauncher.openSeedClone();
                        }
                    } catch (error) {
                        if (lettersHomeLauncher.seedForLaunch) {
                            lettersHomeLauncher.failLaunch("native_seed_bind_callback_failed");
                        }
                    }
                };
                request.send(JSON.stringify({
                    document_id: createdId,
                    incoming_page_id: incomingPageId,
                    reply_page_id: replyPageId
                }));
            }

            function createSeed(forLaunch) {
                lettersHomeLauncher.seedForLaunch = lettersHomeLauncher.seedForLaunch || forLaunch;
                if (seedCreating) {
                    return;
                }
                const folderId = currentFolderId();
                if (!folderId) {
                    if (seedForLaunch) {
                        failLaunch("native_parent_folder_unavailable");
                    }
                    return;
                }
                seedCreating = true;
                root.windowNavigator.open("library-ui/window/create-notebook", {
                    currentFolderId: folderId,
                    lettersHomeSeed: true,
                    onCreated: function(createdId, incomingPageId, replyPageId) {
                        lettersHomeLauncher.seedCreating = false;
                        lettersHomeLauncher.seedDocumentId = createdId || "";
                        lettersHomeLauncher.seedIncomingPageId = incomingPageId || "";
                        lettersHomeLauncher.seedReplyPageId = replyPageId || "";
                        if (!createdId || !incomingPageId || !replyPageId) {
                            if (lettersHomeLauncher.seedForLaunch) {
                                lettersHomeLauncher.failLaunch("native_seed_create_failed");
                            }
                            return;
                        }
                        lettersHomeLauncher.bindCreatedSeed(
                            createdId,
                            incomingPageId,
                            replyPageId
                        );
                    },
                    onFailed: function(reason) {
                        lettersHomeLauncher.seedCreating = false;
                        if (lettersHomeLauncher.seedForLaunch) {
                            lettersHomeLauncher.failLaunch(reason || "native_seed_create_failed");
                        }
                    }
                });
            }

            function requestSeed(forLaunch) {
                seedForLaunch = seedForLaunch || forLaunch;
                if (seedRequestInFlight) {
                    return;
                }
                seedRequestInFlight = true;
                const request =   new   XMLHttpRequest();
                request.open("GET", "http://10.11.99.16:8765/v1/notebook-seed");
                request.onreadystatechange = function() {
                    if (request.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
                        return;
                    }
                    lettersHomeLauncher.seedRequestInFlight = false;
                    try {
                        if (request.status !== 200) {
                            if (lettersHomeLauncher.seedForLaunch) {
                                lettersHomeLauncher.failLaunch("mac_bridge_unavailable");
                            }
                            return;
                        }
                        const response = JSON.parse(request.responseText);
                        if (response.status === "ready" && response.document_id) {
                            lettersHomeLauncher.seedDocumentId = response.document_id;
                            lettersHomeLauncher.seedIncomingPageId = response.incoming_page_id || "";
                            lettersHomeLauncher.seedReplyPageId = response.reply_page_id || "";
                            if (lettersHomeLauncher.seedForLaunch) {
                                lettersHomeLauncher.openSeedClone();
                            }
                            return;
                        }
                        lettersHomeLauncher.createSeed(lettersHomeLauncher.seedForLaunch);
                    } catch (error) {
                        if (lettersHomeLauncher.seedForLaunch) {
                            lettersHomeLauncher.failLaunch("native_seed_callback_failed");
                        }
                    }
                };
                request.send();
            }

            Timer {
                id: lettersHomeSeedWarmTimer
                interval: 1200
                repeat: false
                running: true
                onTriggered: lettersHomeLauncher.requestSeed(false)
            }

            Timer {
                id: lettersHomeDeferredSeedTimer
                interval: 250
                repeat: false
                onTriggered: lettersHomeLauncher.createSeed(false)
            }

            Timer {
                id: lettersHomeLaunchWatchdog
                interval: 2000
                repeat: false
                onTriggered: lettersHomeLauncher.failLaunch("native_launch_timeout")
            }

        }

        REPLACE [[254542236275632405]] WITH {
            onClicked: {
                lettersHomeLauncher.enabled = false;
                lettersHomeLauncher.text = "Preparing letter…";
                lettersHomeLauncher.sessionId = "";
                lettersHomeLauncher.documentId = "";
                lettersHomeLauncher.seedForLaunch = true;
                lettersHomeLaunchWatchdog.restart();
                const request =   new   XMLHttpRequest();
                request.open("POST", "http://10.11.99.16:8765/v1/sessions/start");
                request.setRequestHeader("Content-Type", "application/json");
                request.onreadystatechange = function() {
                    if (request.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
                        return;
                    }
                    try {
                        if (request.status !== 200) {
                            lettersHomeLauncher.failLaunch("mac_bridge_unavailable");
                            return;
                        }
                        const response = JSON.parse(request.responseText);
                        if (!response.session_id) {
                            lettersHomeLauncher.failLaunch("session_id_missing");
                            return;
                        }
                        lettersHomeLauncher.sessionId = response.session_id;
                        lettersHomeLauncher.requestSeed(true);
                    } catch (error) {
                        lettersHomeLauncher.failLaunch("native_start_callback_failed");
                    }
                };
                request.send(JSON.stringify({ profile_id: "ferrari_3.28.0.162" }));
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[8651031636888757197]]
    TRAVERSE [[7711468349764991]]
        LOCATE BEFORE [[477062473974076915]]
        INSERT {
            property var lettersHomeOnFailed: null
            property bool lettersHomeSeed: false
            property bool lettersHomeClone: false
            property string lettersHomeSeedDocumentId: ""
            property string lettersHomeSeedIncomingPageId: ""
            property string lettersHomeSeedReplyPageId: ""
            property string lettersHomeDocumentName: ""
            property string lettersHomeCloneDocumentId: ""
            property bool lettersHomePagesMoved: false
            property int lettersHomeCloneAttempts: 0

            function failLettersHome(reason) {
                lettersHomeCloneTimer.stop();
                console.warn("[LettersHome] notebook factory failed", reason);
                root.lettersHomeOnFailed?.(reason);
                root.windowNavigator.close();
            }

            function createLettersHomeSeed() {
                try {
                    const id = LibraryController.createDocument(
                        root.currentFolderId,
                        "Letters Home Stationery"
                    );
                    if (!id) {
                        failLettersHome("native_seed_create_failed");
                        return;
                    }
                    const document = root.library.entryForId(id);
                    if (!document) {
                        failLettersHome("native_seed_entry_unavailable");
                        return;
                    }
                    LibraryController.setOrientation(document.id, Qt.Vertical);
                    DocumentController.setTemplateForPage(
                        document.id,
                        document.lastOpenedPage,
                        "letters-home-ferrari",
                        DeviceScreenInfo.paperSize
                    );
                    DocumentController.addPageWithTemplateAndPageSize(
                        document.id,
                        1,
                        "letters-home-ferrari",
                        DeviceScreenInfo.paperSize,
                        function() {
                            try {
                                const ready = root.library.entryForId(document.id);
                                const incomingPageId = ready ? ready.idForPage(0) : "";
                                const replyPageId = ready ? ready.idForPage(1) : "";
                                if (!ready || ready.pageCount !== 2
                                        || !incomingPageId || !replyPageId) {
                                    root.failLettersHome("native_seed_not_ready");
                                    return;
                                }
                                root.onCreated?.(
                                    ready.id,
                                    incomingPageId,
                                    replyPageId
                                );
                                root.windowNavigator.close();
                            } catch (error) {
                                root.failLettersHome("native_seed_create_callback_failed");
                            }
                        }
                    );
                } catch (error) {
                    failLettersHome("native_seed_create_exception");
                }
            }

            function cloneLettersHomeSeed() {
                try {
                    const seed = root.library.entryForId(root.lettersHomeSeedDocumentId);
                    if (!seed || seed.pageCount !== 2
                            || seed.idForPage(0) !== root.lettersHomeSeedIncomingPageId
                            || seed.idForPage(1) !== root.lettersHomeSeedReplyPageId) {
                        failLettersHome("native_seed_invalid");
                        return;
                    }
                    root.lettersHomeCloneAttempts = 0;
                    root.lettersHomeCloneDocumentId = "";
                    root.lettersHomePagesMoved = false;
                    DocumentController.copyPages(seed.id, [0, 1], seed.id, 2);
                    lettersHomeCloneTimer.start();
                } catch (error) {
                    failLettersHome("native_seed_copy_exception");
                }
            }

            Timer {
                id: lettersHomeCloneTimer
                interval: 50
                repeat: true
                onTriggered: {
                    root.lettersHomeCloneAttempts += 1;
                    if (root.lettersHomePagesMoved) {
                        const clone = root.library.entryForId(root.lettersHomeCloneDocumentId);
                        const incomingPageId = clone ? clone.idForPage(0) : "";
                        const replyPageId = clone ? clone.idForPage(1) : "";
                        if (clone && clone.pageCount === 2
                                && incomingPageId && replyPageId) {
                            stop();
                            root.onCreated?.(clone.id, incomingPageId, replyPageId);
                            root.windowNavigator.close();
                            return;
                        }
                    }
                    const seed = root.library.entryForId(root.lettersHomeSeedDocumentId);
                    if (!root.lettersHomePagesMoved && seed && seed.pageCount >= 4) {
                        try {
                            const id = LibraryController.createDocumentFromExisting(
                                root.currentFolderId.toString(),
                                root.lettersHomeDocumentName,
                                seed.id,
                                [2, 3]
                            );
                            if (!id) {
                                root.failLettersHome("native_seed_clone_failed");
                                return;
                            }
                            root.lettersHomeCloneDocumentId = id;
                            root.lettersHomePagesMoved = true;
                            root.lettersHomeCloneAttempts = 0;
                        } catch (error) {
                            root.failLettersHome("native_seed_clone_exception");
                        }
                        return;
                    }
                    if (root.lettersHomeCloneAttempts >= 20) {
                        root.failLettersHome("native_seed_copy_timeout");
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        REPLACE [[7713401573498017]] WITH {
            onOpened: (args) => {
                const {
                    currentFolderId,
                    onCreated,
                    onFailed,
                    lettersHomeSeed,
                    lettersHomeClone,
                    lettersHomeSeedDocumentId,
                    lettersHomeSeedIncomingPageId,
                    lettersHomeSeedReplyPageId,
                    lettersHomeDocumentName
                } = args || {};

                if (!SystemMonitor.enoughFreeSpaceForCreating) {
                    if (lettersHomeSeed || lettersHomeClone) {
                        onFailed?.("native_not_enough_space");
                    } else {
                        root.notificationQueue.enqueue({
                            "text": qsTr("Not enough free space to create document")
                        });
                    }
                    root.windowNavigator.close();
                    return;
                }

                if (!currentFolderId) {
                    console.error("create-notebook window opened without currentFolderId");
                    onFailed?.("native_parent_folder_unavailable");
                    root.windowNavigator.close();
                    return;
                }

                root.onCreated = onCreated || null;
                root.lettersHomeOnFailed = onFailed || null;
                root.currentFolderId = currentFolderId;
                root.lettersHomeSeed = lettersHomeSeed === true;
                root.lettersHomeClone = lettersHomeClone === true;
                root.lettersHomeSeedDocumentId = lettersHomeSeedDocumentId || "";
                root.lettersHomeSeedIncomingPageId = lettersHomeSeedIncomingPageId || "";
                root.lettersHomeSeedReplyPageId = lettersHomeSeedReplyPageId || "";
                root.lettersHomeDocumentName = lettersHomeDocumentName || "";

                if (root.lettersHomeSeed) {
                    Qt.callLater(function() { root.createLettersHomeSeed(); });
                    return;
                }
                if (root.lettersHomeClone) {
                    if (!root.lettersHomeSeedDocumentId
                            || !root.lettersHomeSeedIncomingPageId
                            || !root.lettersHomeSeedReplyPageId
                            || !root.lettersHomeDocumentName) {
                        root.failLettersHome("native_seed_clone_inputs_missing");
                        return;
                    }
                    Qt.callLater(function() { root.cloneLettersHomeSeed(); });
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
